title: Jinbe Stands with the Crew
description: On pages 11–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is jinbe stands with the crew.
scene: The scene follows jinbe stands with the crew, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To think that we would be rendered powerless against a mere sea monster ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There is something strange about that beast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sea Bear!!! That's enough!! These guys are barely breathing any more!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guaa a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a a ahhhh!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ehh?!!!! Ikaros-san's body is curling over backward!! What kind of curse is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Put out the fire, you fools !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The fire?! What's Wrong with the Fire?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's going to turn me into dried squid!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you were planning on eating me with a nice drink, then I'll tear your head off!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A long time ago, IKAROS-SAN had a friend who was a giant squid in

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But one day, his friend got too close to the sun...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and turned into a giant dried solid! The trauma of it comes back to him whenever he sees a naked flame...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... yeah, but he's a fish-man, so he wouldn't ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh no!! Ikaros' dried squid lances are always desperate to become real squid again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they suck all the water out of any target they strike!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Squib SquibShould SquibSquib South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South South could quidsquib squib squib squib :!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, man!! He's actually beating up the guy he just dried out!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ikaros-san, don't you think that's enough?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to get over to the Plaza soon, right ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...wow... He really is like a dried squid now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: minister of the right....!! Look up above, in the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've got the King on that thing with them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not call me by that name... what Warrior cannot even protect his own people ....?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Save us, Warrior of the sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Bring us one of your great miracles!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What use is the Neptune army... if it cannot even protect the King whose name it bears?!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Ikaros-san!! There's only two hours left until the King's execution!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have to get over to GYoncord Plaza!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why does he not show his face ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That vile drug consumers the user's very life force ....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should never have presumed to rely upon it.

summary: Jinbe Stands with the Crew. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
